title: PM Assignment Write Surface (Minimal)
objective: Implement the next bounded PM entity write lane by adding create and update contracts, minimal mutation services, and POST/PATCH endpoints for `work.assignments` only, reusing the proven packet-013 and packet-014 validation pattern for intra-work and identity references without changing database schema or broadening PM mutation scope.
constrained_outputs: Create and update schemas for `work.assignments` only, increasing the work schema registry from 14 to 16 entries
Minimal mutation-service and router wiring for `POST /api/v1/work/assignments` and `PATCH /api/v1/work/assignments/{assignment_id}` only
Merged foreign-key validation for `work_package_id`, `task_id`, `employee_id`, and `crew_id` using the existing `OrgValidationError` response shape, plus bounded 404 behavior for missing assignments

Focused regression evidence proving packet-010a, packet-010b, packet-011f, packet-012e, packet-012f, packet-013, packet-013i, packet-013j, packet-014, and packet-014i surfaces remain intact after the minimal assignment-write addition
validation_steps: Confirm packet 015 touches only the bounded assignment POST/PATCH runtime path and does not add dependency, execution-issue, progress-snapshot, or WBS-node writes
Confirm create and update contracts for assignments reuse the existing enum/model surface where possible and raise the work schema registry from 14 to 16 entries only

Confirm the live write surface merges bad `work_package_id`, `task_id`, `employee_id`, and `crew_id` validation into the existing `OrgValidationError` 422 response shape and preserves 404 behavior for a missing assignment

Confirm packet-010a model tests, packet-010b API tests, packet-011f project-write tests, packet-012e identity ORM alignment tests, packet-012f identity joined-read tests, packet-013 work-package write tests, packet-013i work-package integration smoke, packet-013j response enrichment tests, packet-014 task-write tests, and packet-014i task integration smoke still pass or skip as expected after the assignment-write addition
sql_permission_note: Packet 015 is runtime implementation only. No new SQL, schema changes, migration edits, or broader write-surface expansion are authorized.
